name: Quantum Memory
description: Hybrid Memory System with DAG compaction, entity extraction, and auto-recall
author: QSmтco

databasePath.label: Database Path
databasePath.help: Path to Quantum Memory SQLite database (default: ~/.openclaw/quantum.db)

freshTailCount.label: Fresh Tail Count
freshTailCount.help: Number of recent messages protected from compaction

contextThreshold.label: Context Threshold
contextThreshold.help: Fraction of context window that triggers compaction (0.0–1.0)

leafChunkTokens.label: Leaf Chunk Tokens
leafChunkTokens.help: Max source tokens per leaf summary chunk

leafTargetTokens.label: Leaf Target Tokens
leafTargetTokens.help: Target token count for leaf summaries

condensedTargetTokens.label: Condensed Target Tokens
condensedTargetTokens.help: Target token count for condensed summaries

expansionModel.label: Expansion Model
expansionModel.help: Model override for sub-agent expansion queries

ignoreSessionPatterns.label: Ignored Sessions
ignoreSessionPatterns.help: Glob patterns for session keys to exclude from storage

skipStatelessSessions.label: Skip Stateless Sessions
skipStatelessSessions.help: When enabled, skip persistence for stateless sessions

knowledgeGraphEnabled.label: Enable Knowledge Graph
knowledgeGraphEnabled.help: Build knowledge graph from extracted entities

autoRecallEnabled.label: Enable Auto-Recall
autoRecallEnabled.help: Automatically inject relevant memories before each response

autoRecallBudget.label: Auto-Recall Budget
autoRecallBudget.help: Token budget for auto-recall (low, mid, high)

trimEnabled.label: Enable Trimming
trimEnabled.help: Trim messages before compaction (20-86% token reduction, structurally lossless)

trimStubThreshold.label: Stub Threshold
trimStubThreshold.help: Character threshold for stubbing tool results (default: 500)

trimStripThinkingBlocks.label: Strip Thinking Blocks
trimStripThinkingBlocks.help: Remove thinking/reasoning blocks with non-portable signatures

freshTailCount.description: Number of recent messages protected from compaction

contextThreshold.description: Fraction of context window that triggers compaction

leafChunkTokens.description: Max source tokens per leaf summary

leafTargetTokens.description: Target token count for leaf summaries

condensedTargetTokens.description: Target token count for condensed summaries

ignoreSessionPatterns.description: Glob patterns to exclude from storage

trimEnabled.description: Enable structurally lossless trimming before compaction (20-86% token reduction)

trimStubThreshold.description: Character threshold for stubbing tool results (default: 500)
